highlights: Architecting high-performance backend modules using Core Java and DSA, optimizing execution time by 30% through advanced algorithmic implementation.
Engineering enterprise-grade cloud solutions on the Salesforce Platform, utilizing Apex (Triggers, Batch, Asynchronous) and LWC to automate complex CRM workflows.
Designing and optimizing relational schemas in HSQL, implementing complex indexing and query logic to ensure sub-100ms data retrieval for large-scale datasets.
Applying industry-standard SDLC and Clean Code principles within Agile workflows to maintain 99.9% deployment reliability and minimize technical debt.
Developed 15+ high-performance reusable React components using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, reducing overall frontend development cycles by 30%.
Engineered a centralized state management architecture using Redux Toolkit with 6+ independent slices, ensuring predictable data flow across 10+ dynamic modules.
Optimized frontend rendering performance using React.memo and useCallback hooks, achieving a measurable 40% improvement in FPS for data-heavy dashboards.
Integrated 50+ RESTful APIs with sophisticated error-handling patterns and Zod-validated schemas to ensure seamless frontend-backend synchronization.
Implemented fluid UI transitions and micro-interactions using Framer Motion, contributing to a significant boost in user retention and engagement metrics.
